label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out this problem step by step. So, Jane was born on the last day of February in 2001. First, I need to determine what date that actually is. February typically has 28 days, except in leap years when it has 29. But the question says the last day of February, so regardless of whether it's a leap year or not, the last day would be February 28th. Wait, but if 2001 is a leap year, then it would have February 29th as the last day. Hmm, but 2001 isn't a leap year. Leap years are divisible by 4, so 2000 was a leap
